stryker-config._comment: H-096 (HORIZON Cluster F): mutation-testing configuration. **CAVEAT (verified 2026-05-22):** Stryker.NET 4.14.2 does NOT support F# — invoking it on this solution raises `System.NotSupportedException: Language not supported: Fsharp`. The config file preserves the INTENT (which strategy files would be in scope; what mutation score thresholds would target) for the day F# support lands in Stryker OR an F#-aware mutation tool emerges. The HORIZON H-096 proposal as written is NOT achievable with current tooling.
stryker-config._status: blocked-on-tooling: Stryker.NET does not support F#; no F#-aware mutation testing tool currently exists
stryker-config._revisit-trigger: Stryker.NET F# support lands (https://github.com/stryker-mutator/stryker-net/issues — track F# language support issue), OR an F#-native mutation testing framework emerges with at least the same level of maturity as Stryker.NET for C#.
